manifest.name: Anki Integration

name: Anki Integration

releases.author: noahboos
releases.description:
# Anki Integration - 1.4.3
## New features
- Added automatic tag completion for "Add a new note from code block" method.
  - Use the "tags" line in your code block using the following syntax : `tags: "tagUn", "tagDeux", "tagTrois";`.
## Patch
- Issue #12 - If no cardTags property in metadata, "Add a new note from Metadata" won't work.
## What will come next ?
- Ability to add images to an Anki Note directly from Obsidian.
- (Idea only, feedback appreciated) Ability to export data under the form of an Anki-friendly file type (`.csv`, perhaps).
- (Idea only, feedback appreciated) Support for custom metadata.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NoahBoos/obsidian-anki-integration/compare/1.4.2...1.4.3

releases.author: noahboos
releases.description:
# Anki Integration - 1.4.2
## Patch
- Tags can now be autofilled by using metadata using the `cardTags` metadata.
## What will come next ?
- Ability to add images to an Anki Note directly from Obsidian.
- (Idea only, feedback appreciated) Ability to export data under the form of an Anki-friendly file type (`.csv`, perhaps).
- PATCH - Autofill tags behavior for "Add note from code block" command.
- Support for custom metadata.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NoahBoos/obsidian-anki-integration/compare/1.4.1...1.4.2

releases.author: noahboos
releases.description:
# Anki Integration - 1.4.1
## Patch
- Issue #5 - Create a new deck's modal's button now display the text it must display.
- Issue #6 - Triggering the "Add note from metadata" command while no notes are opened now display the modal with its whole content, not only an empty modal.
- Issue #7 - Triggering the "Add note from metadata" command while no notes are opened and selecting a model now display its fields successfully.
- Issue #8 - No more console error while triggering "Add a new note from code block" command.
## What will come next ?
- Ability to add images to an Anki Note directly from Obsidian.
- (Idea only, feedback appreciated) Ability to export data under the form of an Anki-friendly file type (`.csv`, perhaps).
- PATCH - Auto-fill tags behavior for both "Add note from metadata" and "Add note from code block" commands.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NoahBoos/obsidian-anki-integration/compare/1.4.0...1.4.1

releases.author: noahboos
releases.description:
# Anki Integration - 1.4.0
## New features
- Add as many tag as you want to your new note before pushing them to Anki thanks to an advanced and useful form.
  - No documentation is available, but opening any Add-Note-related modal will now show a "Tags" section where you can add your tags.
## What will come next ?
- Ability to add images to an Anki Note directly from Obsidian.
- (Idea only, feedback appreciated) Ability to export data under the form of an Anki-friendly file type (`.csv`, perhaps).

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NoahBoos/obsidian-anki-integration/compare/1.3.1...1.4.0

releases.author: noahboos
releases.description:
# Anki Integration - 1.3.1
> [!IMPORTANT]  
> This release a bit special since I've been working along on different features and bug patches. Also, it's my first project using SemVer, so maybe `v1.3.1` is less appropriate and I should have called this version `v1.2.0` ? I don't know ! Anyway, this `v1.3.1` includes two features, each relevant to `v1.2.0` and `v1.3.1`. It also includes two patch that I made in each of these versions.
>
> Shortly said, I didn't release `v1.2.0`, `v1.2.1` and `v1.3.0` and here I am, releasing `v1.3.1` !
## New features
### v1.3.0
- Adds new notes and generates flashcards in Anki from Obsidian and the currently open file by parsing a code block.
    - [Detailed behavior of code block parsing](https://github.com/NoahBoos/obsidian-anki-integration/wiki/Adding-a-note#add-a-new-note-by-using-current-notes-codeblock)
    - [Command - Add a new note from code block](https://github.com/NoahBoos/obsidian-anki-integration/wiki/Commands-list#add-a-new-note-from-codeblock)
    - [Settings - How to hide / display code blocks in preview mode ?](https://github.com/NoahBoos/obsidian-anki-integration/wiki/Settings-list#enable-invisible-codeblock)
    - Related to a feature request submitted in Issue #1.
### v1.2.0
- Added a `SHIFT + ENTER` shortcut to trigger deck and notes creation without needing to click the button manually.
## Patch
- Issue #2 - Fields now disappear after deselecting a (pre-)selected model.
- Issue #3 - Code block using "`Anki Integration`" as the language can now be hidden on demand.
## What will come next ?
- Ability to add tags to an Anki Note directly from Obsidian.
- Ability to add images to an Anki Note directly from Obsidian.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NoahBoos/obsidian-anki-integration/compare/1.1.0...1.3.1

releases.author: noahboos
releases.description:
# Anki Integration - 1.1.0
## New features
- Adds new notes and generates flashcards in Anki from Obsidian and the currently open file by parsing metadata.
    - [Detailed behavior of metadata parsing](https://github.com/NoahBoos/obsidian-anki-integration/wiki/Adding-a-note#detailed-behavior-of-metadata-parsing)
    - [Command - Add a new note from metadata](https://github.com/NoahBoos/obsidian-anki-integration/wiki/Commands-list#add-a-new-note-from-metadata)

## What will come next ?
- Improved customization options for added notes.
- Adds new notes and generates flashcards in Anki from a postprocessor.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NoahBoos/obsidian-anki-integration/compare/1.0.0...1.1.0

releases.author: noahboos
releases.description:
# Anki Integration - 1.0.0 - Initial Release
## Features
- Synchronizes data from Anki to Obsidian.
- Creates new decks in Anki from Obsidian.
- Adds new notes and generates flashcards in Anki from Obsidian.
## What will come next ?
- Improved customization options for added notes.
- Adds new notes and generates flashcards in Anki from Obsidian metadata.
